turns.user: KoreDocs cleanup step for a repeatable test. In KoreFile folder /Finance/Calculators, check whether ten-year-compound-interest.koresheet already exists. If it exists, delete that file using the KoreDocs MCP tools. If it does not exist, say that no existing file was found. Do not delete any other files.

Create a KoreDocs KoreFile spreadsheet.

Folder path: /Finance/Calculators
Filename: ten-year-compound-interest.koresheet

Create a 10-year compound interest calculator for:
- Starting balance: 10000
- Annual interest rate: 5% per year
- Years: 10

Use the KoreDocs MCP tool `koredocs_create_compounding_schedule` if available. Pass annual_rate as decimal 0.05. After creating it, verify the sheet by reading range A1:D14 and report the KoreFile id, filename, folder path, final balance, and open URL if returned.
